name: Noetherian Rings
description: ACC on ideals. Hilbert basis: R Noetherian ⇒ R[x] Noetherian. Primary ideals, Artin–Rees.

graph TD
    D1["Def: Noetherian\nACC on ideals"]
    D2["Def: Finitely generated\nideal I=(a₁,...,aₙ)"]
    D3["Def: Hilbert basis\nR Noeth ⇒ R[x] Noeth"]
    D4["Def: Artinian\nDCC on ideals"]
    T1["Thm: I fg ⇔ ACC\nNoetherian equiv"]
    T2["Thm: Hilbert basis\nR[x] Noeth"]
    T3["Thm: Quotient Noeth\nR/I Noeth"]
    T4["Thm: Localization\nS⁻¹R Noeth"]
    T5["Thm: Artin–Rees\nIⁿ∩J stabilizes"]
